translations.en: I am entitled to child benefit.
translations.es: Tengo derecho a la prestación por hijos.
translations.zh-Hans: 我有资格领取儿童福利金。
translations.yue: 我有資格攞兒童福利金。
translations.ru: Я имею право на детское пособие.
translations.pt: Tenho direito ao abono de família.
translations.vi: Tôi có quyền nhận trợ cấp trẻ em.
translations.uk: Я маю право на дитячу допомогу.
translations.hi: मुझे बच्चों की सहायता राशि पाने का अधिकार है.
translations.pl: Mam prawo do zasiłku na dziecko.
translations.ro: Am dreptul la alocație pentru copii.
translations.cs: Mám nárok na přídavek na dítě.
translations.ja: 私は児童手当を受ける権利があります。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite lexical verb (present, 1st sg) meaning ‘to have’; governs the direct object ‘Anspruch’.
Masculine noun, singular accusative; direct object of ‘habe’; part of the fixed collocation ‘Anspruch auf + Akk’.
Preposition introducing a prepositional complement to ‘Anspruch’; with ‘Anspruch’ it selects accusative.
Neuter noun, singular (accusative as object of ‘auf’); specifies the content of the entitlement.

sentences.target: Du hast Anspruch auf eine Pause.

translations.de: Du hast Anspruch auf eine Pause.
translations.en: You are entitled to a break.
translations.fr: Tu as droit à une pause.
translations.ko: 너는 쉬는 시간을 가질 권리가 있어.
translations.pt: Você tem direito a uma pausa.
translations.vi: Bạn có quyền nghỉ giải lao.
translations.nl: Je hebt recht op een pauze.
translations.hi: तुम्हें ब्रेक लेने का अधिकार है.
translations.nb: Du har rett til en pause.
translations.sv: Du har rätt till en paus.
translations.da: Du har ret til en pause.
translations.ja: あなたには休憩する権利があります。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject.
Finite lexical verb (present, 2nd sg); takes ‘Anspruch’ as direct object.
Masculine noun, singular accusative; direct object of ‘hast’; in the collocation ‘Anspruch auf + Akk’.
Preposition introducing the complement to ‘Anspruch’; selects accusative.
Indefinite article, feminine accusative singular; agrees with ‘Pause’ as the object of ‘auf’.
Feminine noun, singular accusative; object of the preposition ‘auf’; target/content of the entitlement.

sentences.target: Mein Anspruch ist nicht so hoch.

translations.de: Mein Anspruch ist nicht so hoch.
translations.fr: Je ne suis pas très exigeant.
translations.ru: У меня не такие уж высокие требования.
translations.he: הסטנדרטים שלי לא כל כך גבוהים.
translations.vi: Tiêu chuẩn của tôi không cao đến thế.
translations.ar: معاييري ليست عالية إلى هذا الحد.
translations.nl: Mijn eisen zijn niet zo hoog.
translations.uk: Мої вимоги не такі вже високі.
translations.hi: मेरे मानक इतने ऊँचे नहीं हैं.
translations.pl: Moje wymagania nie są aż tak wysokie.
translations.el: Οι απαιτήσεις μου δεν είναι τόσο υψηλές.
translations.sv: Mina krav är inte så höga.
translations.ro: Standardele mele nu sunt chiar atât de ridicate.
translations.da: Mine krav er ikke så høje.
translations.ja: 私の基準はそんなに高くないです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person sg), nominative masculine singular; modifies ‘Anspruch’.
Masculine noun, singular nominative; subject of the copular clause.
Finite copular auxiliary (present, 3rd sg) linking the subject to the predicate adjective.
Negation particle; negates the predicate ‘so hoch’.
Degree adverb modifying ‘hoch’; forms the phrase ‘nicht so hoch’ (not so/that high).
Predicate adjective; complements the copula ‘ist’ to describe the subject.

sentences.target: Wir prüfen Ihren Anspruch auf Erstattung.

translations.de: Wir prüfen Ihren Anspruch auf Erstattung.
translations.en: We are checking your claim for a refund.
translations.es: Estamos revisando tu solicitud de reembolso.
translations.fr: Nous vérifions votre demande de remboursement.
translations.it: Stiamo verificando la tua richiesta di rimborso.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在审核您的退款申请。
translations.yue: 我哋正喺核實你嘅退款申請。
translations.ru: Мы проверяем вашу заявку на возврат средств.
translations.pt: Estamos analisando seu pedido de reembolso.
translations.he: אנחנו בודקים את בקשת ההחזר שלך.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang kiểm tra yêu cầu hoàn tiền của bạn.
translations.uk: Ми перевіряємо вашу заявку на повернення коштів.
translations.hi: हम आपकी धनवापसी के अनुरोध की जाँच कर रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Sprawdzamy Twój wniosek o zwrot pieniędzy.
translations.el: Ελέγχουμε το αίτημά σας για επιστροφή χρημάτων.
translations.nb: Vi sjekker kravet ditt om refusjon.
translations.id: Kami sedang memeriksa klaim pengembalian dana Anda.
translations.cs: Kontrolujeme váš nárok na vrácení peněz.
translations.ja: 返金の申請を確認しています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural personal pronoun in nominative; subject.
Finite lexical verb (present, 1st pl); takes the NP ‘Ihren Anspruch’ and PP ‘auf Erstattung’ as complements.
Possessive determiner (formal 2nd person), masculine accusative singular; modifies ‘Anspruch’.
Masculine noun, singular accusative; direct object of ‘prüfen’.
Preposition selecting accusative; introduces a PP complement specifying the domain (‘Erstattung’).
Feminine noun, singular accusative; object of ‘auf’; specifies what the entitlement pertains to.

Mein Anspruch ist nicht so hoch.
Wir prüfen Ihren Anspruch auf Erstattung.

Mein Anspruch ist nicht so hoch.
Wir prüfen Ihren Anspruch auf Erstattung.

You are entitled to a break.
We are checking your claim for a refund.
